title: Runtime Replay System
purpose: Implement deterministic runtime replay infrastructure to reconstruct prior executions, diagnose failures, support recovery workflows, and enable governance audits.
architectural_constraints: Replay must be deterministic: same input produces same output
Must support interrupted sessions and failed executions
Must not mutate runtime state during replay
acceptance_criteria: Can reconstruct any execution from event stream plus checkpoints
Replay indexing allows O(1) lookup by execution_id
Replay integrity validation detects corrupted or incomplete traces
Interrupted sessions replayable from last checkpoint

failure_modes.scenario: Replay system becomes source of truth drift
failure_modes.mitigation: Replay is strictly read-only; integrity checksums on all source data
Multiple checkpoint levels, integrity validation before replay
